original_statement: which team has at least 8 seasons played?
mutated_statement: which something has at least some content?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Quantifier vagueness + Attribute generalization: "team"→"something" (specific entity → vague placeholder) | "at least 8"→"at least some" (numeric specificity lost → vague quantifier) | "seasons played"→"some content" (specific temporal/metric attribute → generic content)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 judge_thought 中可识别的关键信息是代理写道“The question appears to target... interpreting 'at least some content' as having at least one appearance (>0)”并列出具体队伍。该表述显示代理意识到原始变异问题语义不明确，因此在内部做出了解释性假设（将“some content”映射为“playoff appearances > 0”）。代理没有向用户求证或请求澄清，反而基于该假设直接执行查询并返回具体答案。基于这些表现——明确承认自己是在“interpreting/appears to target”并在此基础上猜测目标且给出具体结果——最符合“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”这一分类。
